images.title: 1968-07 Villa Corinne et Philippe vue de la dune.jpg
images.description: Villa Corinne et Philippe (now destroyed) seen from the dune in Capbreton (Landes, France).

images.title: La Savane de Capbreton vers 1955.jpg
images.description: Capbreton (Landes, France) and the district of la Savane about 1955. The water tower was not built yet.

images.title: Blockhaus (Capbreton) at low tide from the dune (2) 2.jpg
images.description: 2 blockhaus in Capbreton seen from the dune at low tide (Landes, France). In one month, compared to the photo of september, the sand is 50cm higher at the foot of the basement of the blockhaus and 30cm lower on the rocks in front of the blockhaus.
